title: sloanea parvifructa
intro: Sloanea parvifructa, also known as the small-fruited Sloanea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Eopteridiaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sloanea parvifructa include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Sloanea parvifructa typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the leaves or roots of the plant, which can be consumed as teas or used topically as creams or ointments.
